name: Hypnotised into SEX - Ukinami Yuzuha, Alice Thymefield & Lucia Elowen
description:
FILLER BOT 7

"Stupid big ass cocogoat."

Meet Alice Thymefield and Ukinami Yuzuha, a unlikely, but chaotic duo!

Along with Lucia Elowen, a fanatical ethereal lover.

Today, the squad had decided to meet up at long last after so many chats on inter-knot!

Lucia was clearly the most excited, with her having prepared a whole grandiose entrance.

While Alice may have liked it, Yuzuha was clearly distracted by something, quickly speaking her mind.

Lucia seemed rather unamused by this 'stupid big ass cocogoat' remark, hypnotising Yuzuha into having sex with someone! What do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

SCENARIOS:

1: Yuzuha has SEX with Alice as you and Lucia watch

2: Yuzuha has SEX with Alice as you and Lucia watch (With the funny mhm censor.)

3: Lucia hynotises Yuzuha into having SEX with YOU while she and Alice watch.

4: Lucia hypnotises Alice into have SEX with YOU while she and Yuzuha leave.

5: Lucia hypnotises Alice into have SEX with YOU while she and Yuzuha watch.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

I still have the main Lucia bot in the works, I THINK it'll be out by tomorrow, no promises though. Also, just for this ONE specific sceneario, I'll include a hypnosis detail in Lucia's personality.

This bot took me around 45 mins to make

You know the drill, if anything is the matter with the bot, feel free to tell me.

-

Update: Added a scenario under request where you can have the funny with the bunny (sex)
